==Biography==

== Trivia ==
* Reached Top 3 in Challenger.
* Doesn't play support in solo queue.
*''"With '''[[Digolera|Jesus]]''' in the team, I'm safe"'', he said in an interview before winning the [[2013 World Cyber Games/Qualifiers/Brazil|WCG 2013 Brazilian Qualifiers]] .
* Portrayed as {{ci|Jinx}} in the CBLoL 2015 official wallpaper.
* Was trolled by [[Mylon]] after a '''"Pro vs. Pro"''' session in 2015 to answer a "non-existing question" about having to travel for about 3 hours in the early morning from Limeira (SP) to the Riot studio in the capital at that time.<ref>[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qy_LUpyaBts MYLON TIRA DANS DO SÉRIO - PRO VS PRO (CBLOL 2015)] ''youtube.com''</ref>
